title: That's why we craft!
description: A 1.20.1 mod that implements Clash Royale stuff
body: This is a 1.20.1 mod that adds the Clash Royale cards into the game, along with a working elixir system and 1 to 1 card stats to keep most interactions equal to the game, it adds arenas from the game as structures with chests filled with cards and other stuff, also having a new command to summon the arenas easily.
